title: Pre-ticket audit: live layer-3 staged atlas snapshot coherence
problem: Principal audit post-ticket-326 recommends advancing live-research proof. Live layer-3 staged atlas pytest (ticket-285) still skips unsuitable_live_artifact; medium-risk operator proof needs hardened scope before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit documents live layer-3 env gates, skip semantics, and public JSON boundary.
GO/NO-GO verdict with hardened scope for follow-on implementation ticket.
No production code changes beyond audit runner/docs if needed.
non_goals: Live network pytest execution in CI.
Removing unsuitable_live_artifact skip without operator proof plan.
